image.alt: Dr. Paint veteran crew leaders painting a residential interior

description: Dr. Paint's founder, Omar Rivera, is a former Active Duty Air Force member who transitioned to the Air Force Reserve Component. In January 2014, he founded Dr. Paint in Palm Coast, FL.

Omar began as the estimator, then painter, and the 'marketing guy' before making Dr. Paint one of the fastest growing painting companies in Central Florida. In less than a year, Dr. Paint grew into 5 full-time, on-staff painters and 2 administrative professionals.

Now Dr. Paint serves not only Palm Coast but all of Volusia, Flagler, and all counties throughout the St. Johns area. We've collected hundreds of five-star testimonials from happy residential and commercial property owners.

image.alt: Omar Rivera - Founder of Dr. Paint, veteran-owned painting company

description: Dr. Paint is one of the most highly-rated local painting contractors on Google with a great team of trustworthy painters who are always on time and have customer desires as top priorities.
From colors and materials to deadlines being adhered to, you'll always get what you asked for — and our 95% satisfaction rate speaks for itself.

process.description: At Dr. Paint, we believe that the dedication, care, and time we put into each paint job sets us apart. We've fine-tuned our processes over the years to become true painting pros.

interior.title: Interior Painting Process
steps: Review the painting plan, colors, and details with you
Prepare the room: remove wall items, cover furniture, put down protective paper, cover ceiling fans, remove switch/outlet covers
Patch all holes, cracks, and scratches in drywall
Paint ceilings first, then walls using brushes and 9 or 18-inch rollers — top to bottom
Paint baseboards with brushes
Clean up: reinstall switch plates, outlet covers, remove drop cloths, return furniture
Final walkthrough with you to ensure complete satisfaction
Customer satisfaction survey

exterior.title: Exterior Painting Process
steps: Initial review: walk around property confirming colors and areas to paint
High-quality power washing of exterior walls, soffits, and foundation
Preparation: seal cracks with masonry patch, mask windows and doors, caulk frames, cover lamps and cameras, protect garden plants, trench around foundation
Spray chalk primer and sealer
Paint soffits, facia, and gutters with specialized spray paint
Paint body of building using spray application and paint rolling
Paint trim with rollers and brushes, then paint doors (removing weatherstripping and hardware)
Allow paint to dry, check for touch-ups, restore everything to original position
Final walkthrough with you
Customer satisfaction survey

decks.title: Decks & Driveways Process
steps: Meet with you to confirm colors and areas
Surface clean with power washer
Seal cracks with concrete base caulking
Apply specialized concrete stain with rollers for complete coverage
Allow curing process (can take a few days)
Final inspection with you
Customer satisfaction survey

cta.title: Personalized Painting Solutions
cta.description: Every job needs a personal touch. We plan around YOUR individual needs and desires. We never cut corners or make assumptions.

section.headline: Google's Most Rated Palm Coast Painting Contractor
section.description: We combine the best of three important factors we believe all successful businesses must have: trust, process, and leadership.

features.title: Trustworthy Iron-Clad Guarantee
features.description: Trust is our best and most important asset. We always arrive on time and keep our word. With our Make-It-Right Guarantee, we will quickly and thoroughly respond to any concerns until you're completely satisfied. We back our work with a 5-year labor and material warranty.

features.title: Unique Painting Processes
features.description: Many contractors execute projects with no system, resulting in inconsistency. We produce consistent quality with standard operating procedures, daily checklists, and ongoing supervision on every single project.

features.title: Veteran Crew Leaders
features.description: Good production systems are essential, but on-site leadership is critical. Our veteran crew leaders are thoroughly screened, field-tested, trained, and have years of experience. Problems are quickly anticipated and solved.

features.title: Affordable & Transparent Pricing
features.description: We prioritize getting the job done with efficiency while ensuring no hidden costs or surprise fees. Our experienced painters avoid costly mistakes, saving you hundreds in potential repairs.

features.title: Free Paint Guarantee
features.description: We take pride in delivering exactly what we promise. If our best efforts haven't satisfied you, the cost of your paint is on us. That's our commitment to 100% customer satisfaction.

features.title: Licensed, Insured & Veteran-Owned
features.description: Every painter undergoes an 8-point screening process: application, questionnaire, personality assessment, in-person interview, reference check, hands-on test, and drug screening. Only the best wear the Dr. Paint uniform.

section.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
section.description: Expert answers to common questions about painting, our process, warranties, and what to look for in a painting contractor.

items.question: What should I look for in a painting contractor?
items.answer: Here are a few 'green flags' that you're working with a reputable company: the contractor is focused on reliability, integrity, and customer service; has multiple years of experience in your community; offers a warranty or quality guarantee; works with industry-leading products and reputable brands; can provide testimonials from satisfied customers; and hires experienced, trustworthy staff who take the time to listen to you.

items.question: Do you offer a warranty on your work?
items.answer: Yes, we offer a 5-year labor and material warranty on our painting work. We will return if there is any issue with the work we did, even if it was completed days or weeks prior. This is part of our commitment to 100% customer satisfaction. We also offer our Free Paint Guarantee: if our best efforts haven't satisfied you, the cost of your paint is on us.

items.question: How does your painting process work?
items.answer: We begin by reviewing the painting plan, colors, and details with you. We then prepare the room by removing wall items, covering furniture, putting down protective paper, and covering fixtures. We patch any drywall damage, then paint top to bottom (ceilings first, then walls, then trim). After drying, we do a complete cleanup, restore everything to its original position, and conduct a final walkthrough with you to ensure satisfaction.

metadata.label: Exterior
metadata.value: Power wash → Seal → Paint → Final check

items.question: Can you work for my business?
items.answer: Yes! We offer a full suite of commercial painting services for offices, retail stores, warehouses, and restaurants. In order to keep your operations running smoothly during the day, we can even paint at night or during other non-business hours, including weekends.

items.question: Do you offer virtual estimates?
items.answer: Yes, we can do a project estimate via video chat. This allows us to see your space, understand your needs, and provide an accurate quote without requiring an in-person visit. It's a convenient option that many of our clients appreciate.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Yes, we offer flexible payment plans to help make your painting project more affordable. Contact us to discuss financing options that work for your budget.

items.question: Do you use low or no VOC paint?
items.answer: Yes, we use premium, industry-leading paints including low-VOC and no-VOC options from trusted brands. We're happy to discuss the best paint products for your specific needs, especially if you have children, pets, or health concerns.

items.question: Do you clean up after you paint?
items.answer: Absolutely. Cleanup is a critical part of our process. We put back all items that were removed from the walls, reinstall switch plates and outlet covers, take away all drop cloths and protective paper, and return all furniture to its original position. We leave your space spotless.

items.question: What forms of payment do you accept?
items.answer: We accept multiple forms of payment for your convenience. Contact us to confirm the payment methods we currently support.

items.question: What happens if it rains when the job has already started?
items.answer: For exterior painting projects affected by rain, we monitor weather conditions closely. If rain occurs, we pause exterior work and protect all prepped surfaces. We resume as soon as conditions are optimal for application. Your project timeline will be communicated transparently throughout.
